'''ât-j-y''' ('''tajaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foreappoint|foreappoint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foreappoint|foreappoint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| tajaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tajayithi|tajayithi]] || [[word:tajayiji|tajayiji]] || [[word:tajayishi|tajayishi]] || [[word:tajayi|tajayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tajayuthuth|tajayuthuth]] || [[word:tajayujuj|tajayujuj]] || [[word:tajayushush|tajayushush]] || [[word:tajay|tajay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tajayuthu|tajayuthu]] || [[word:tajayuju|tajayuju]] || [[word:tajayushu|tajayushu]] || [[word:tajayu|tajayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tajayufuth|tajayufuth]] || [[word:tajayufuj|tajayufuj]] || [[word:tajayufush|tajayufush]] || [[word:tajayuf|tajayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tajayethe|tajayethe]] || [[word:tajayeje|tajayeje]] || [[word:tajayeshe|tajayeshe]] || [[word:tajaye|tajaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tajayothoth|tajayothoth]] || [[word:tajayojoj|tajayojoj]] || [[word:tajayoshosh|tajayoshosh]] || [[word:tajay|tajay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tajayotho|tajayotho]] || [[word:tajayojo|tajayojo]] || [[word:tajayosho|tajayosho]] || [[word:tajayo|tajayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tajayofoth|tajayofoth]] || [[word:tajayofoj|tajayofoj]] || [[word:tajayofosh|tajayofosh]] || [[word:tajayof|tajayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tajayĂŠthĂŠ|tajayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:tajayĂŠjĂŠ|tajayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:tajayĂŠshĂŠ|tajayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:tajayĂŠ|tajayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tajayathath|tajayathath]] || [[word:tajayajaj|tajayajaj]] || [[word:tajayashash|tajayashash]] || [[word:tajay|tajay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tajayatha|tajayatha]] || [[word:tajayaja|tajayaja]] || [[word:tajayasha|tajayasha]] || [[word:tajaya|tajaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tajayafath|tajayafath]] || [[word:tajayafaj|tajayafaj]] || [[word:tajayafash|tajayafash]] || [[word:tajayaf|tajayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:tajayasha|tajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gotajayasha|gotajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokitajayasha|gokitajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:tajaynĂŒsha|tajaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gotajaynknĂŒsha|gotajaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokitajaynĂŒsha|gokitajaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tajayshĂ«sha|tajayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotajaynkshĂ«sha|gotajaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitajayshĂ«sha|gokitajayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tajayrosha|tajayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotajaynkrosha|gotajaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitajayrosha|gokitajayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tajaymusha|tajaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gotajaynkmusha|gotajaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajaymusha|gokitajaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:tajaysherasha|tajaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gotajaynksherasha|gotajaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokitajaysherasha|gokitajaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:tajayngasha|tajayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gotajaynkngasha|gotajaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokitajayngasha|gokitajayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tajayasha|tajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gotajaynkyasha|gotajaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokitajayasha|gokitajayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:tajayamasha|tajayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gotajaynkyamasha|gotajaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokitajayamasha|gokitajayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:tajaynĂŒshĂ«sha|tajaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotajaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gotajaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitajaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokitajaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tajaynĂŒrosha|tajaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotajaynknĂŒrosha|gotajaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitajaynĂŒrosha|gokitajaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajaynĂŒmusha|tajaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotajaynknĂŒmusha|gotajaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajaynĂŒmusha|gokitajaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:tajayshĂ«nĂŒsha|tajayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotajaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gotajaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitajayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokitajayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tajayshĂ«rosha|tajayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotajaynkshĂ«rosha|gotajaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitajayshĂ«rosha|gokitajayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajayshĂ«musha|tajayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotajaynkshĂ«musha|gotajaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajayshĂ«musha|gokitajayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:tajayronĂŒsha|tajayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotajaynkronĂŒsha|gotajaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitajayronĂŒsha|gokitajayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:tajayroshĂ«sha|tajayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotajaynkroshĂ«sha|gotajaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitajayroshĂ«sha|gokitajayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tajayromusha|tajayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotajaynkromusha|gotajaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitajayromusha|gokitajayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:tajaymunĂŒsha|tajaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gotajaynkmunĂŒsha|gotajaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokitajaymunĂŒsha|gokitajaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:tajaymushĂ«sha|tajaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gotajaynkmushĂ«sha|gotajaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokitajaymushĂ«sha|gokitajaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:tajaymurosha|tajaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotajaynkmurosha|gotajaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokitajaymurosha|gokitajaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:tajay|tajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:tĂŠjĂŠy|tĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hotajay|hotajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hotĂŠjĂŠy|hotĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotajay|hohotajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohotĂŠjĂŠy|hohotĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒtajay|nĂŒtajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒtĂŠjĂŠy|nĂŒtĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtajay|nĂŒnĂŒtajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠjĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒtĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻtajay|nĂŻtajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻtĂŠjĂŠy|nĂŻtĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtajay|nĂŻnĂŻtajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠjĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻtĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lutajay|lutajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lutĂŠjĂŠy|lutĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutajay|lulutajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulutĂŠjĂŠy|lulutĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:litajay|litajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:litĂŠjĂŠy|litĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitajay|lilitajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilitĂŠjĂŠy|lilitĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kotajay|kotajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kotĂŠjĂŠy|kotĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotajay|kokotajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokotĂŠjĂŠy|kokotĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ketajay|ketajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ketĂŠjĂŠy|ketĂŠjĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketajay|keketajay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keketĂŠjĂŠy|keketĂŠjĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
